description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build NPM Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow consists of two jobs: build-slice-compilers and pack-npm. The build-slice-compilers job uses a matrix strategy to build slice2js compilers for different operating systems and architectures, and uploads the compiled artifacts. The pack-npm job depends on the build-slice-compilers job, downloads the compiler artifacts, copies the binaries to a staging path, builds JavaScript, packs an NPM package, and uploads the resulting NPM packages.
